s-1.ptxt: PRECAUTION
ALIGN FRONT WHEELS FACING STRAIGHT AHEAD
DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER NO. 3 STEERING WHEEL COVER

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 2 lower steering wheel cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape up the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER NO. 2 STEERING WHEEL COVER

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 2 lower steering wheel cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape up the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING PAD

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), loosen the 2 "torx" screws until the groove along the screw circumference catches on the screw case.
Pull out the steering pad from the steering wheel assembly and support the steering pad with one hand as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: When removing the steering pad, do not pull the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the horn connector from the steering pad.
Disconnect the 2 airbag connectors and remove the steering pad.

atten3.ptxt: When handling the airbag connector, take care not to damage the airbag wire harness.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING WHEEL ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the steering wheel assembly set nut.
Put matchmarks on the steering wheel assembly and the steering main shaft.
Disconnect the connectors from the spiral cable.
Using SST, remove the steering wheel assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A> and the screw <B>.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt:
Remove the bolt and the screw or

.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING COLUMN COVER (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <D>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the lower steering column cover.
Disengage the claw and remove the upper steering column cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING COLUMN COVER (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <Q>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the lower steering column cover.
Disengage the claw and remove the upper steering column cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE TURN SIGNAL SWITCH ASSEMBLY WITH SPIRAL CABLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connectors from the turn signal switch assembly with spiral cable sub-assembly.
Using pliers, grip the claws of the clip and remove the turn signal switch assembly with spiral cable sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips.
Disengage the guide and 4 claws, and then remove the instrument cluster finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <E>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <R>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 UNDER COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws.
Disengage the 2 guides and remove the No. 2 under cover sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A>.
Remove the 4 screws <B>.
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <N>.

Remove the screw or

and the 3 screws .
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 claws and the 3 clips, and then remove the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.
with Seat Heater System:

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Open the lid of the upper console panel.
Apply protective tape to the area shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws and the 5 clips, and then remove the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <O>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply protective tape to the areas shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 3 clips.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 4 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the instrument panel No. 2 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RADIO RECEIVER WITH HEATER CONTROL PANEL ASSEMBLY (w/o Navigation System)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts.
Pull the radio receiver with heater control panel assembly toward the rear of the vehicle and disengage the 4 clips.
Disconnect each connector and remove the radio receiver with heater control panel assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NAVIGATION RECEIVER WITH HEATER CONTROL PANEL ASSEMBLY (w/ Navigation System)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts.
Pull the navigation receiver with heater control panel assembly toward the rear of the vehicle and disengage the 4 clips.
Disconnect each connector and remove the navigation receiver with heater control panel assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX POCKET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box pocket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX CARPET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box carpet.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the clamp.
Remove the 2 bolts <G> and the console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <O>.
Disengage the clamp.
Remove the 2 bolts <S> or <T> and the console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 2 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <O>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 2 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 1 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <O>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 1 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Pull the upper part of the garnish toward the inside of the cabin and disengage the 2 clips.
Cut off the clip <A>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front pillar garnish LH.
Remove the clip <A> from the vehicle body.
Protect the curtain shield airbag assembly.

s3.ptxt: Cover the airbag with a 700 mm (27.56 in.) x 120 mm (4.72 in.) cloth or piece of nylon and fix the ends of the cover with tape, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Cover the curtain shield airbag with a protective cover as soon as the front pillar garnish is removed.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 1 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 clips and remove the instrument panel No. 1 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 1 SPEAKER PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 claws and the 2 clips.
Disengage the 2 guides and remove the instrument panel No. 1 speaker panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT NO. 2 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and front No. 2 speaker assembly.
Disconnect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT PILLAR GARNISH RH

s2.ptxt: Pull the upper part of the garnish toward the inside of the cabin and disengage the 2 clips.
Cut off the clip <A>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front pillar garnish RH.
Remove the clip <A> from the vehicle body.
Protect the curtain shield airbag assembly.

s3.ptxt: Cover the airbag with a 700 mm (27.56 in.) x 120 mm (4.72 in.) cloth or piece of nylon and fix the ends of the cover with tape, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Cover the curtain shield airbag with a protective cover as soon as the front pillar garnish is removed.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 3 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 clips and remove the instrument panel No. 3 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 SPEAKER PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 claws and the 2 clips.
Disengage the 2 guides and remove the instrument panel No. 2 speaker panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT NO. 2 SPEAKER ASSEMBLY (for RH Side)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 DEFROSTER NOZZLE GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 8 clips and the 4 guides.
Disconnect each connector and remove the No. 1 defroster nozzle garnish.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT INSTRUMENT PANEL WIRE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL SAFETY PAD ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Disengage each clamp.
Disconnect each connector.
Remove the bolt <J>.
Remove the 2 passenger airbag bolts <K>.
with Plasmacluster:
Remove the 2 bolts <C> or <H>.
Remove the 2 nuts <I> or <Z>.
Disengage the 5 claws and remove the instrument panel safety pad assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL SAFETY PAD ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Disengage each clamp.
Disconnect each connector.
Remove the bolt <Y>.
Remove the 2 passenger airbag bolts <V>.
with Plasmacluster:
Remove the 2 bolts <N>, <a> or <b>.
Remove the 2 nuts <U>.
Disengage the 5 claws and remove the instrument panel safety pad assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 3 INSTRUMENT PANEL STAY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the claw and remove the 5 No. 3 instrument panel stays.
